title: caliper rates override file
description: Local override of the embedded USD rate card. Local entries are treated as trusted user-provided rates for the named model. Unlisted models keep source-verified embedded rates when available and are otherwise reported as partial/unpriced.

input.description: Rate per million uncached input tokens.

cached_input.description: Rate per million cached input tokens.

reasoning_output.description: Rate per million reasoning output tokens. Defaults to `output` when omitted or null.

cache_creation_input.description: Rate per million cache-write input tokens. Defaults to `input` when omitted or null.

cache_creation_input_1h.description: Rate per million one-hour cache-write input tokens. Defaults to `input` when omitted or null.
